examples: If such ratios also apply on a smoggy day in LA, watch out.
In smoggy weather, the machine would breathe in the air in front of the bike and blow out a stream of clean air toward the biker's face.
The thick nitrogen atmosphere holds fog, mist, smoggy haze and rain clouds.
The dust in the Martian atmosphere is comparable to that of a moderately smoggy day in Los Angeles.
Coastal residents of the western United States should hunker down for a smoggy summer and fall, NASA scientists say.
